name: Cake Space Shooter
short_description: 2d space shooter where player need avoid and destroy different space ships and asteroid waves
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player control space ships in this 2d space retro shooter game which now contains 6 different levels. Levels contains different obstacles like cakes. Player need avoid and destroy different enemy space ships which have different weapons. Also player need avoid or destroy meteorite waves. When player survive enough long at different levels, levels are completed. Also game contains steam achievements. By playing levels player can unlock different space ships.

So can you be the space hero and survive all levels

FEATURES:

  • 6 levels

  • Different space ships to select

- Steam achievements

- Different enemy space ships and asteroid waves

  • Collect health pick ups and different weapons and armors

  • Survive enough long to finish levels
